# Failure-to-Hypothesis Map

| Failure pattern | Hypothesis | Next test |
|---|---|---|
| Low impressions | Audience/bid/objective is wrong. | Broaden targeting or change objective. |
| High impressions, low CTR | Hook or relevance is weak. | Test pain-specific hooks. |
| High CTR, high bounce | Ad-page mismatch. | Create dedicated landing page matching the ad. |
| Page views, no CTA clicks | Offer is weak or unclear. | Test lower-risk offer. |
| Demo views, no signup | Proof is interesting but risk remains. | Add pricing, security, comparison, trial. |
| Trial starts, no activation | Product onboarding friction. | Add sample data and first-value checklist. |
| Activation, no payment | Value or pricing mismatch. | Test packaging and upgrade triggers. |
| Many questions, few conversions | Buyer needs education. | Add FAQ, objection ads, retargeting proof. |
| Negative comments | Claim/trust mismatch. | Replace claim with proof and limitations. |
| Good metrics, bad revenue | Attribution or quality issue. | Use CRM quality and lift/holdout measurement. |

A failed metric must always become a hypothesis and a next test.
